query: Apple revenue 2024 fiscal year $ billion Yahoo Finance
answer: Apple's 2024 fiscal year revenue was $136.7 billion to $139.2 billion. This marked a 10% to 12% increase from the previous year. The highest quarterly revenue was $124.3 billion.
